planning_energy: <break time="100ms"/>*pulling out calendar* <break time="150ms"/>Okay okay okay, let's MAP this!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>*color-coded markers ready* <break time="100ms"/>Time to visualize!
<break time="100ms"/>*spreadsheet mode activated* <break time="150ms"/>I can SEE it coming together!
event_anticipation: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>*can barely sit still* <break time="150ms"/>I can already picture it!
<break time="150ms"/>*mentally walking through venue* <break time="100ms"/>The tables here... the flowers there...
<break time="100ms"/>*eyes closed, imagining* <break time="150ms"/>I can FEEL how amazing this is going to be!
countdown_excitement: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>*checking calendar obsessively* <break time="150ms"/>So CLOSE!
<break time="150ms"/>*drumroll sounds* <break time="100ms"/>The countdown is ON!
post_event_glow: <break time="200ms"/>*happy sigh* <break time="150ms"/>That was perfect. Just perfect.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>*still smiling* <break time="100ms"/>Did you SEE their faces?!
<break time="100ms"/>*reliving the moment* <break time="150ms"/>And when they saw the surprise... <break time="100ms"/>MAGIC.
stress_moments: <break time="200ms"/>*deep breath* <break time="150ms"/>Okay. We've got this. We've PLANNED for this.
<break time="150ms"/>*centering* <break time="100ms"/>Curveball? Fine. We adapt. That's what planners DO.
<break time="100ms"/>*stress-organizing* <break time="150ms"/>When in doubt, make a list. Lists save lives.
